sources.name: World Bank Logistics Performance Index 2022
sources.coverage_note: LPI scores use a 1-5 scale. 2022 is the latest non-null year returned by the World Bank API for the selected indicators at collection time.
sources.method_note: The World Bank LPI combines six logistics dimensions. The 2023 LPI methodology says scores are averaged from logistics-professional survey responses and the overall score is aggregated with principal components analysis.

sources.name: USAID Supply Chain Shipment Pricing Data
sources.coverage_note: Reference shipment-level dataset for future lane-level lead-time calibration. The catalog describes ARV and HIV lab shipments, pricing, destination countries, and supply-chain expenses.
sources.method_note: Not used as runtime seed yet because the source endpoint was not consistently reachable from this workspace during collection; retained as a cited public shipment-data source.

model_references.name: Google OR-Tools
model_references.use_in_model: Route optimization is structured as constrained shortest-path / low-cost route selection, aligned with OR-Tools graph and vehicle-routing concepts.

model_references.name: VROOM Project
model_references.use_in_model: Future route engine candidate. VROOM supports VRP, CVRP, VRPTW, pickup-delivery, custom matrices, and open-source routing backends.

model_references.name: PM4Py Process Mining
model_references.use_in_model: Bottleneck diagnosis uses process-event ideas: per-stage duration, waiting time, variation, and performance ranking.
